name: Fondue Bourguignonne
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the tomato sauce, heat oil in a saucepan.
Add shallots and cook gently until soft.
2. Stir in garlic, chopped tomatoes with their juice,
and tomato puree. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, uncovered,
for 30 minutes or until the sauce has reduced and
thickened. Stir in parsley.
4. Serve hot or cold. Cut the steak into 1-inch cubes
and place in serving dish. The meat is cooked in fondue
and dipped in sauce.
